basics.name: Naeem Akhtar
basics.summary: With over 9+ years of combined experience in Web Development and Designing, I have worked in the Digital Marketing and Information Technology domains.
highlights: Skilled in developing GUI using HTML, CSS, JavaScript/JQuery, and responsive designs.
Skilled in hand-coding, implementing code and troubleshooting a variety of web development problems.
Improve accessibility and design of external and internal web applications using semantic markup integrated with server side language like PHP / .NET Environment.
Experience in LESS & SASS, PHP, and MySQL.
Thorough subject knowledge, strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with an ability to perform in challenging environments.

work.summary: I have worked on several projects ranging from responsive layouts, CSS, HTML to developing newsletters and Marketing forms & mailers with notable clients like Airtel, WorldBook Online and Google (SEO developer).
highlights: Helping other team members in fixing cross browser & cross platform CSS issues.
Worked on various website maintenance tasks to accomplish the same.
UI development of site using HTML/HTML5, CSS/CSS3 and JavaScript.
